summary: Mission v15.0 Testing Complete - Connexion chat, campagnes et liens dédiés. All 18 backend tests passed. Key features verified: POST /chat/smart-entry now updates participantName and participantEmail in session (lines 5433-5443), link_token support works, chat sessions return enriched participantName, calendar fix < 0 verified, colors (Client=gray LEFT, Coach=#D91CD2 RIGHT) verified in CRMSection.

integration_issues.issue: Socket.IO connection timeout observed in console logs, but chat functionality still works via REST API fallback

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ server.py lines 5433-5443: POST /chat/smart-entry now updates participantName and participantEmail in session - VERIFIED
✅ server.py lines 5393-5398: link_token support - session of the link is used when link_token is passed
✅ server.py lines 1717-1727: Campaign messages inserted in chat_messages with proper fields
✅ scheduler_engine.py lines 102-103: Messages inserted in chat_messages collection via poser_message_en_base
✅ ChatWidget.js line 1806-1807: Calendar fix daysUntilCourse < 0 (not <= 0) - Same-day booking works
✅ BookingPanel.js line 22-23: Calendar fix daysUntilCourse < 0 (not <= 0) - Same-day booking works
✅ CRMSection.js lines 680-685: Colors verified - Client=bg-gray-700/80 LEFT, Coach=#D91CD2 RIGHT
✅ PromoCodesTab.js lines 79-96: copyCodeToClipboard function properly implemented with fallback
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed participants and sessions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v15.0 fully verified. Key v15.0 features: 1) POST /chat/smart-entry updates participantName and participantEmail in session for CRM display (lines 5433-5443), 2) link_token passed -> session of link used, 3) GET /chat/sessions returns sessions with participantName enriched (17 sessions with names), 4) Campaigns insert messages in chat_messages (lines 1717-1727), 5) Scheduler inserts messages via poser_message_en_base (line 103), 6) Calendar < 0 fix verified in both ChatWidget.js and BookingPanel.js, 7) Colors: Client=gray-700 LEFT, Coach=#D91CD2 RIGHT in CRMSection, 8) Copy button in PromoCodesTab works with fallback. Anti-regression: 8 contacts (PASS), 20 reservations (PASS).

verified_v150_features.smart_entry_link_token: ✅ link_token passed -> session of link used
verified_v150_features.calendar_fix: ✅ daysUntilCourse < 0 (not <= 0) in both ChatWidget.js and BookingPanel.js
verified_v150_features.etancheite_coach_id: ✅ Super Admin sees all, Partners filtered by coach_id
